meta.title: Budapest Night — Events, Parties, Food & Culture
meta.description: Discover Budapest nightlife, parties, restaurants, cafés, and culture by district and neighborhood.

sidebar.listVenueBody: Reach night owls and culture seekers across Budapest.

footer.tagline: Neon-lit local guide · Prices for planning only

venue.bookingSoon: Booking link coming soon. Visit the venue website or contact them directly.
venue.shareDescription: Send this venue to a friend.

discover.title: Discover {category} in Budapest
discover.tagline: Curated. Local. Built for nights out.
discover.resultsIn: {count, plural, one {# spot} other {# spots}} in {district}
discover.noDbHint: Add listings in /admin or run npm run ingest:listing with a curator JSON payload.
discover.noMatchesHint: Try another district, neighborhood, or filter.

blurb.Events: concerts, festivals, boat parties, and rooftops
blurb.Parties: ruin bars, clubs, DJ nights, and late parties
blurb.Restaurants: bistros, fine dining, and Danube-side tables
blurb.Cafés: coffee, brunch, dessert bars, and all-day hangouts

saved.title: Saved venues
saved.subtitle: Everything you've bookmarked for your night out.
saved.emptyMessage: Save spots from Discover and they'll appear here.

meetup.title: Culture circles
meetup.subtitle: Art walks, gallery nights, food circles, and local creators across Budapest.
meetup.shareDescription: Share this culture circle with a friend.

assistant.title: Night Guide
assistant.subtitle: Your AI companion for Budapest events, parties, food, and culture.
assistant.intro: Ask about districts, vibes, budgets, or what to do tonight.
assistant.slowDownDesc: Too many requests — please try again in a moment.
assistant.noCreditsDesc: Please add AI credits to continue.

split.title: Crew split
split.subtitle: Divide the tab before someone mysteriously forgets their card. Pulls from your night budget or a custom total.
split.fromBudget: {count, plural, one {# venue} other {# venues}} in your budget · €{total} subtotal
split.manualHint: No venues in the budget yet — enter a total or add spots first.
split.emptyMessage: Add venues to your budget or enter a manual total above.
split.crewHint: Drag the slider — includes the friend who said they would pay you back.
split.roundUpHint: Avoid awkward €23.47 moments at the ATM.
split.funLine: The one who ordered pálinka for the table still owes double. House rules.
split.shareLine: Budapest Night crew split: €{perPerson} each ({people} people, €{total} total incl. tip)

notFound.subtitle: Signal lost somewhere in District VII
notFound.headline: This page went home before last call
notFound.line1: You took a wrong turn between the Danube, a ruin bar, and a thermal bath that definitely was not on the map.
notFound.line2: Our Night Guide AI shrugged, ordered a pálinka, and refused to give directions.
excuses: Szimpla Kert absorbed it during a jazz set
It only exists after 3 AM and you are early
The pálinka deleted it for sport
GPS gave up and moved to Buda
A party boat has it now. No refunds.
